recommendations.title: The Beachnickers
recommendations.overview: Things go from bad to worse when four co-workers decide to enjoy the extended holiday at a beach house with their families.

recommendations.title: Head Over Heels
recommendations.overview: After being left by her husband and fired from her work, a workaholic, thirtysomething businesswoman is forced to go through a big change in her life and becomes a partner on a decadent sex shop.

recommendations.overview: After waking from a coma, Tino learns his future in-laws have given him a high-powered financial job, for which he is woefully unqualified.

recommendations.title: Les Francis

recommendations.title: The Ladies Man
recommendations.overview: After his girl leaves him for someone else, Herbert gets really depressed and starts searching for a job. He finally finds one in a big house which is inhabited by many, many women. Can he live in the same home with all these females?
